tasks.subject: Task 1: DB Schema — Remove stub fields, add PostReaction model
Task 2: Zod Types — Add ReactionType, PostReactionSummary, update PostSchema
Task 3: Fix postsService.spec.ts — remove likeCount/dislikeCount from mock
Task 4: Add server reactionService with groupPostReactions helper and tests
Task 5: Update postsService — include reactions in getPostWithId and getCommentsForPost
Task 6: Update feedService — include reactions in feed posts
Task 7: Add API routes — PUT and DELETE /api/posts/[postId]/reactions
Task 9: Add reactionUtils — emoji and label maps
Task 12: Run full test suite and update reference docs
